cases.input: Run the seo-audit skill on https://example.com, a B2B SaaS marketing site, standalone with no vault. Produce the full audit.
must: scores the site to a letter grade
separates quick wins from larger fixes
every finding cites the specific page, element, tag, or signal it rests on
records a baseline so a later re-audit can chart against it
uses no invented traffic, ranking, or volume numbers

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.desc: findings name the exact element or tag, not generic best-practice advice

dimensions.name: prioritization
dimensions.desc: fixes are ranked by impact, the highest-leverage ones lead

dimensions.name: evidence
dimensions.desc: each claim is traceable to something observable on the page

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.desc: each fix is a concrete thing a person can do, not a platitude

dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.desc: the major technical SEO categories are addressed, not just a few easy ones
